export default "\n \n \n Covid 19 Tracker\n \n \n\n\n\n\n \n \n Global\n last updated on : {{lastUpdate|date:'medium'}}\n \n \n New Confirmed : {{globalData.NewConfirmed}}\n New Deaths : {{globalData.NewDeaths}}\n New Confirmed : {{globalData.NewRecovered}}\n Total Confirmed : {{globalData.TotalConfirmed}}\n Total Deaths : {{globalData.TotalDeaths}}\n Total Recovered : {{globalData.TotalRecovered}}\n\n \n \n read latest news on coronavirus\n \n \n\n\n \n Countrytotal cases(+new cases)\n \n {{country.Country}}\n {{country.TotalConfirmed}}(+{{country.NewConfirmed}})\n \n \n\n \n \n \n \n \n\n";
